privacy.metaDescription: Learn how The Grid Agency collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.title: Our Privacy Policy

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.p1: When you use our website or subscribe to our newsletter, we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and any other information you voluntarily provide.
s1.p2: We may collect information about your device, IP address, browser type, and browsing behaviour on our website for analytical purposes.

s2.title: 2. Use of Information
s2.p1: We use the information collected to provide and improve our services, customise your experience, send newsletters, and communicate with you about updates.
s2.p2: We will not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.

s3.title: 3. Third-Party Links
s3.p1: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites.

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.p1: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

s5.title: 5. Your Choices
s5.p1: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt-out of receiving newsletters by following the unsubscribe instructions in each email.
s5.p2: If you have any privacy-related concerns or questions, please contact us at info@thegrid.agency

s6.title: 6. Changes to This Privacy Policy
s6.p1: We reserve the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the revised policy on this page.

privacy.consent: By using our website and services, you consent to the terms of this Privacy Policy.
